---
Name: ✨ Feature request
About: Suggest a new distribution, routine, or enhancement
Title: "[Feature]: "
Labels: enhancement
---

## ✨ Problem / use case

What are you trying to compute that the library doesn't currently support?
Describe the real scenario, not just the proposed feature.

## 💡 Proposed behavior

What you'd like the library to do — the function surface, inputs, and returned
quantity.

## 🔀 Alternatives considered

Other approaches, including any current workaround (e.g. composing existing
`K_STATS_*` functions or `Application.WorksheetFunction`).

## 🎯 Scope

Which areas would this likely touch? (check any that apply)

- [ ] Normal family (Standard Normal, Normal, Lognormal)
- [ ] Classical test-statistic family (Student t, Chi-square, F)
- [ ] Positive continuous family (Gamma, Exponential, Weibull)
- [ ] Bounded continuous family (Beta, Uniform)
- [ ] A new distribution not yet covered
- [ ] Special functions / numerical kernels (`PROB_*`)
- [ ] Moments (mean / variance / std dev)
- [ ] Test harness
- [ ] Documentation only

## 📐 Numerical notes

Any known reference implementation, algorithm, accuracy target, or tail-behavior
concern that would guide implementation and verification.

## 📎 Additional context

Examples, formulae, or links that help explain the idea.
